sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INTEGER, start_time TIME, end_time TIME);
SELECT id, datesub('hour', start_time, end_time) AS hours_diff, 5! AS factorial_result FROM test_data;
SELECT id, (SELECT datesub('hour', start_time, end_time) FROM test_data AS td WHERE td.id = test_data.id) AS subquery_hours_diff, (2! + 2!) AS combined_factorial FROM test_data;
SELECT id, datesub('hour', TIME '01:00:00', TIME '07:00:00') AS hours_diff, (3! + NULL) AS factorial_with_null FROM test_data GROUP BY id HAVING hours_diff > 5;
SELECT id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_data WHERE datesub('hour', start_time, end_time) > 4) AS count_diff_hours, (5! - 120) AS adjusted_factorial FROM test_data;
SELECT id, end_time, datesub('hour', TIME '12:00:00', end_time) AS adjusted_time FROM test_data WHERE end_time IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, end_time, datesub('hour', CASE WHEN end_time > TIME '06:00:00' THEN end_time ELSE TIME '06:00:00' END, end_time) AS conditional_diff FROM test_data;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_data AS SELECT id, datesub('hour', start_time, end_time) AS hours_difference FROM test_data WHERE id < 3;
SELECT id, total, (total + 4!) AS increased_total FROM (SELECT id, datesub('hour', start_time, end_time) AS total FROM test_data) AS subquery;
